mapper.select: /* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationToteMappingWaveSeq - 분류토트매핑웨이브 Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classiftote_mapp_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationToteMappingOrderSeq - 분류토트매핑오더 Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classiftote_mapp_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationToteCloseWaveSeq - 분류토트마감 웨이브 Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classiftote_clos_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationToteCloseOrderSeq - 분류토트마감 오더 Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classiftote_clos_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationToteCloseItemSeq - 분류토트마감 아이템 Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classiftote_clos_item') AS ITEM_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getDasAssortResultWaveSeq - DAS Assort Result Wave Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_prcsrslt_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getDasAssortResultOrderSeq - DAS Assort Result Order Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_prcsrslt_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getDasAssortResultItemSeq - DAS Assort Result Item Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_prcsrslt_ic') AS ITEM_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasAssortResultWaveSeq - RobotDAS Assort Result Wave Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_prcsrslt_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasAssortResultOrderSeq - RobotDAS Assort Result Order Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_prcsrslt_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasAssortResultItemSeq - RobotDAS Assort Result Item Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_prcsrslt_ic') AS ITEM_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasIntegrationResultWaveSeq - RobotDAS 이형물/미출 Result Wave Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_rsltxnis_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasIntegrationResultOrderSeq - RobotDAS 이형물/미출 Result Order Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_rsltxnis_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasIntegrationResultItemSeq - RobotDAS 이형물/미출 Result Item Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_rsltxnis_ic') AS ITEM_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasPackCompleteResultWaveSeq - RobotDAS 포장완료 Result Wave Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_pakcompl_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasPackCompleteResultOrderSeq - RobotDAS 포장완료 Result Order Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_pakcompl_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasPackCompleteResultItemSeq - RobotDAS 포장완료 Result Item Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_pakcompl_ic') AS ITEM_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasAddBoxWaveSeq - RobotDAS 박스추가 요청 Wave Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_boxadd_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasAddBoxOrderSeq - RobotDAS 박스추가 요청 Order Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_boxadd_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasAddBoxItemSeq - RobotDAS 박스추가 요청 Item Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_boxadd_ic') AS ITEM_SEQ
mapper.update: /* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - updateClassifToteBarcodeForWms - WMS 토트마감 바코드 UPDATE SQL */ UPDATE TWORK_INFO_OB_HD A SET CLASSIFCNTRBARCODE = (SELECT DISTINCT C.CLASSIFTOTEBRCD FROM TWIF_DAS_CLASSIFTOTE_CLOS_WA B INNER JOIN TWIF_DAS_CLASSIFTOTE_CLOS_ORDER C ON B.WASEQ = C.WASEQ WHERE B.WAHDKEY = #{waHdKey} AND A.OBHDKEY = C.OBHDKEY AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND B.IFPRCSDATE IS NULL) ,UPDATEDATE = #{sysdate} ,UPDATEURKEY = #{surkey} WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctKey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owKey} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TWIF_DAS_CLASSIFTOTE_CLOS_WA B INNER JOIN TWIF_DAS_CLASSIFTOTE_CLOS_ORDER C ON B.WASEQ = C.WASEQ WHERE B.WAHDKEY = #{waHdKey} AND A.OBHDKEY = C.OBHDKEY AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND B.IFPRCSDATE IS NULL)

/* wif-das-interface-sql-oracle.xml - updateClassifToteQtyForWms - WMS 토트마감 수량 UPDATE SQL */ UPDATE TWORK_INFO_OB_DT A SET CLASSIFSQTY = (SELECT CLASSIFSQTY + QTY FROM TWIF_DAS_CLASSIFTOTE_CLOS_WA B INNER JOIN TWIF_DAS_CLASSIFTOTE_CLOS_ORDER C ON B.WASEQ = C.WASEQ INNER JOIN TWIF_DAS_CLASSIFTOTE_CLOS_IC D ON C.WASEQ = D.WASEQ AND C.ORDERSEQ = D.ORDERSEQ WHERE B.WAHDKEY = #{waHdKey} AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.OBHDKEY = C.OBHDKEY AND A.ICKEY = D.ICKEY AND B.IFPRCSDATE IS NULL) WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctKey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owKey} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TWIF_DAS_CLASSIFTOTE_CLOS_WA B1 INNER JOIN TWIF_DAS_CLASSIFTOTE_CLOS_ORDER C1 ON B1.WASEQ = C1.WASEQ INNER JOIN TWIF_DAS_CLASSIFTOTE_CLOS_IC D1 ON C1.WASEQ = D1.WASEQ AND C1.ORDERSEQ = D1.ORDERSEQ WHERE B1.WAHDKEY = #{waHdKey} AND A.OBHDKEY = C1.OBHDKEY AND A.ICKEY = D1.ICKEY AND A.CTKEY = B1.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B1.OWKEY AND B1.IFPRCSDATE IS NULL)
